summary: Implemented and released DinoBrain v0.1.5 Observatory OS Health Upgrade. Added shared graph health generation at .dino/index/graph-health.json, wired it into SQLite index refresh and memory audit snapshots, expanded Observatory with health chips, read trace, node lifecycle, sync risk, and graph-health API, added graph health verification, bumped app/installer/client versions to 0.1.5, committed and pushed main, tagged v0.1.5, uploaded GitHub Release assets, and verified remote ZIP SHA256 matches local.
decisions: Use a shared TypeScript graph-health module so Observatory, CLI refresh, and audit_memory_use rely on the same health model.
Treat an empty LLM Wiki graph as degraded rather than merely warning because the user's goal is compounding session-derived knowledge.
Keep data repo sync as dry-run/manual-review only per project policy; release app repo separately from operational memory changes.
Publish v0.1.5 from commit 39f3d608cdf28e285328f3fb54ab8846a8d99e06 and verify the private GitHub Release asset through the asset API rather than relying on browser download URLs.
next_steps: Review DinoBrain data repo changes before any data commit/push; git_sync classified all 32 current data changes as requires_review.
On another computer, install from the v0.1.5 release ZIP and use DinoBrain Codex Hook Approval.cmd or /hooks if Codex requires hook trust approval.
